raw_consumer_statement:
I requested a refund of {$300.00} total for charges made on the following dates : XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX Washington DC XXXX {$130.00} XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX XXXX, Washington DC XXXX {$130.00} XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX XXXX Washington DC, {$130.00} On XX/XX/XXXX XXXX Citibank advised me to speak directly to the vendor for the refund to be made. I spoke directly to the vendor and they refunded the amount as it appeared on my online credit card account. The refunds were listed as " pending ''. Two days later, they were no longer in my account. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX, I called Citibank to resolve the issue and each time I spoke with a representative or manager, they were unable to resolve the issue of the disappeared refunds as they said there was no evidence of them. 

I am currently receiving bills from Citbank despite the fact that they actually owe me {$300.00}.
